news.title:
FMCG firms face rising packaging costs due to higher crude oil prices and rupee depreciation.
Rationalising of commercial LPG impacts production in some sectors amid the West Asia conflict.
news.summary:
FMCG firms face rising packaging costs due to higher crude oil prices and rupee depreciation.
Rationalising of commercial LPG impacts production in some sectors amid the West Asia conflict.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd hits 52-week low at Rs.171.2 on 16 Mar 2026.
Decline linked to edible oil sector pressures and weak financial metrics.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd hits 52-week low at Rs.171.2 on 16 Mar 2026.
Decline linked to edible oil sector pressures and weak financial metrics.

news.title:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.
news.summary:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd received approval for promoter reclassification from BSE and NSE.
Adani entities shifted to public category under SEBI Regulation 31A; formerly Adani Wilmar Ltd.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd received approval for promoter reclassification from BSE and NSE.
Adani entities shifted to public category under SEBI Regulation 31A; formerly Adani Wilmar Ltd.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business fined ₹28.72M by GST appellate authority over refund claim.
Company plans to appeal, expecting no significant impact on its business.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business fined ₹28.72M by GST appellate authority over refund claim.
Company plans to appeal, expecting no significant impact on its business.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd's revenue rose 10%, edible oils volume grew 8%.
Mustard oil showed double-digit growth; alternate channels up 42%, quick commerce up 65%.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd's revenue rose 10%, edible oils volume grew 8%.
Mustard oil showed double-digit growth; alternate channels up 42%, quick commerce up 65%.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd (formerly Adani Wilmar) reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 10% YoY, with 3% volume growth and stable profitability.
Key brands like Fortune grew 13%, while Kohinoor achieved 32% growth; alternate channels, including quick commerce, saw robust momentum.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd (formerly Adani Wilmar) reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 10% YoY, with 3% volume growth and stable profitability.
Key brands like Fortune grew 13%, while Kohinoor achieved 32% growth; alternate channels, including quick commerce, saw robust momentum.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd reported a shift from flat to negative performance in Q3 FY25.
Despite record net sales, profitability and cash position declined, leading to a Strong Sell grade.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd reported a shift from flat to negative performance in Q3 FY25.
Despite record net sales, profitability and cash position declined, leading to a Strong Sell grade.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹5.53B from ₹7.9B YoY, showing lower profitability.
Q3 EBITDA margin dropped to 2.97% from 4.7% YoY, indicating reduced efficiency.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹5.53B from ₹7.9B YoY, showing lower profitability.
Q3 EBITDA margin dropped to 2.97% from 4.7% YoY, indicating reduced efficiency.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd's board to meet on Feb 3, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results.
The company will also hold an earnings call with analysts and investors on the same day.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd's board to meet on Feb 3, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results.
The company will also hold an earnings call with analysts and investors on the same day.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business fell 1.6% to Rs.209.25, underperforming Sensex's 3.3% drop.
Stock hit 52-week low amid selling pressure and a downgrade to Sell rating.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business fell 1.6% to Rs.209.25, underperforming Sensex's 3.3% drop.
Stock hit 52-week low amid selling pressure and a downgrade to Sell rating.

news.title:
Budget 2026 may focus on TDS overhaul as a key tax reform.
Network Media Investment Limited certified for ISO IEC compliance in information security.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 may focus on TDS overhaul as a key tax reform.
Network Media Investment Limited certified for ISO IEC compliance in information security.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Q3 FY26 volumes grew low single digits, driven by Edible Oil and FMCG.
E-com, Q-com grew 42% YoY; Quick Commerce up 65% YoY; outlets expanded 18% to 9.5 lakh.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Q3 FY26 volumes grew low single digits, driven by Edible Oil and FMCG.
E-com, Q-com grew 42% YoY; Quick Commerce up 65% YoY; outlets expanded 18% to 9.5 lakh.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd faces a penalty of ₹1.77 lakh from Nagpur State Tax Authority under CGST and MGST Acts.
The penalty relates to input tax credit reversal; the company plans to appeal with no material financial impact expected.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd faces a penalty of ₹1.77 lakh from Nagpur State Tax Authority under CGST and MGST Acts.
The penalty relates to input tax credit reversal; the company plans to appeal with no material financial impact expected.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd received a penalty order of Rs. 94.1L under Section 73 of Odisha GST Act.
The company plans to appeal the order and foresees no material financial or operational impact.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd received a penalty order of Rs. 94.1L under Section 73 of Odisha GST Act.
The company plans to appeal the order and foresees no material financial or operational impact.

news.title:
AWL Agri Business Ltd reclassifies Adani Group from promoter to public category.
Adani Commodities LLP exits AWL by selling 7% equity via bulk deal on Nov 21, 2025.
news.summary:
AWL Agri Business Ltd reclassifies Adani Group from promoter to public category.
Adani Commodities LLP exits AWL by selling 7% equity via bulk deal on Nov 21, 2025.

news.title:
Adani Group sold 90.98M shares of AWL, holding 0 shares post-sale.
Board approval pending for promoter-to-public shareholder reclassification.
news.summary:
Adani Group sold 90.98M shares of AWL, holding 0 shares post-sale.
Board approval pending for promoter-to-public shareholder reclassification.

news.title:
Adani Wilmar executed a NSE block trade worth Rs. 156.2cr.
The trade involved ~5.7mn shares at Rs. 274.7 each.
news.summary:
Adani Wilmar executed a NSE block trade worth Rs. 156.2cr.

TCS partners with TPG for ₹18,000 crore AI data center; RIL exits Russian crude imports.
JSW Energy gets CoC approval for rail infra plan; AWL, Max Financial face block deals.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Group plans ₹2,501-cr block deal to sell 7% stake in AWL Agri Business.
AWL reported Q2 net profit down 21.3% YoY to ₹244.7 cr, revenue up 22% to ₹17,605 cr.
news.summary:
Adani Group plans ₹2,501-cr block deal to sell 7% stake in AWL Agri Business.
AWL reported Q2 net profit down 21.3% YoY to ₹244.7 cr, revenue up 22% to ₹17,605 cr.
